page: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the ECadsv6 server family. It is equipped with 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system features 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server configuration includes 307 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The presence of dedicated vCPUs ensures consistent compute allocation without resource sharing at the CPU level.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance provides a memory-optimized resource profile. The combination of dedicated AMD processing cores, high memory density, and local storage capacity makes it appropriate for memory-intensive workloads, relational databases, in-memory caching systems, and data processing tasks that require significant memory overhead relative to compute cores.
description: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the ECadsv6 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. For storage, the instance is equipped with 307 GB of local disk space and is Premium Storage capable. It does not include GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive applications, offering a balanced allocation of dedicated compute resources and high-density memory. The inclusion of local storage alongside a memory-optimized profile makes this server type suitable for database hosting, in-memory caching, and enterprise workloads requiring substantial memory capacity without the overhead of excessive compute cores.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC8ads_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, and 307 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine with eight dedicated AMD vCPUs, sixty-four gigabytes of RAM, and local storage.

Sixty-four gigabytes of system memory providing eight gigabytes per core

Designed for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, and in-memory caching
